data.title: The Morning Momentum Flywheel
data.description: A consistent 10-minute meditation and hydration routine acts as a psychological anchor that reliably triggers high-level cognitive performance in complex technical tasks like Java and Data Structures.

data.title: The Midnight Recovery Debt
data.description: Late-night digital consumption (gaming and doomscrolling) creates a direct, predictable failure state the following morning, resulting in chronic absenteeism from engineering and data science lectures.

data.title: The Perfectionist Procrastination Trap
data.description: Engaging in low-stakes environmental optimization—such as customizing IDE themes, organizing desks, or managing playlists—serves as a subconscious avoidance mechanism to delay high-friction project work like AgriVeda or DevOps labs.
